title: Savory Crisp Greek Eggplant Salad
description: A refreshing take on traditional Greek eggplant salad, featuring the nutty flavor of Chinese sesame sauce and a crunchy texture.
instructions: Cut the eggplant into 1/4-inch thick slices.
Place the eggplant slices on a paper towel-lined plate, sprinkle with salt, and let sit for 30 minutes to draw out excess moisture.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the eggplant slices on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
In a large bowl, combine the roasted eggplant, red onion, olives, artichoke hearts, and parsley.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Chinese sesame sauce and Greek yogurt.
Pour the dressing over the eggplant mixture and toss to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
